no: Content mod by Angel (MiH author). Adds level-scaled spawns to BG1 areas. MUST install BEFORE Tweaks and Tricks (TR) generic components — blows up if installed after. Also has known interactions with SCS that the author has fixed. Install before both TR and SCS.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks encounter difficulty overlaps with BGEE Leveled Spawns

co.no: Level-scaled spawn tables for BG1 areas. Hard conflict with TR generic components if installed after. Install in CREATURE MODS category (before tactical mods) to ensure correct order.
